services.heading: Our Services
services.subheading: Beyond great beer, OpenCraft offers spaces and experiences for every occasion

shopRental.title: Shop Rental
shopRental.description: Rent out the entire OpenCraft bar for your private events, parties, or gatherings. Full bar service included with craft beer on tap.

meetingRoom.title: Meeting Room Rental
meetingRoom.description: Our second floor meeting room is available for rent — perfect for workshops, meetups, presentations, and collaborative sessions. Equipped with projector and seating.

beerLounge.title: Beer Lounge Service
beerLounge.description: Experience our premium beer lounge — curated tastings, beer flights, and guided pairing experiences for groups and private events.

services.inquiryCta: Contact us for bookings and inquiries

about.heading: About OpenCraft
about.subheading: Where the love of craft beer meets the spirit of open culture

story.heading: Our Story
story.paragraph1: OpenCraft is a craft beer bar born from the fusion of two passions: exceptional craft beer and the open-source culture. We believe that just as open-source software is built by communities sharing knowledge freely, great beer experiences are best when shared openly.
story.paragraph2: The name OpenCraft reflects our philosophy — BeerCraft + OpenSource. We celebrate the art and science of brewing, while fostering an open, welcoming community where everyone can discover and appreciate craft beer.

values.heading: Our Values
values.communityDesc: Building a welcoming space for beer lovers and curious newcomers alike.
values.qualityDesc: Curating exceptional beers from the best breweries, local and international.
values.knowledgeDesc: Sharing beer education freely — from brewing techniques to tasting notes.
values.sustainabilityDesc: Supporting sustainable brewing practices and local producers.
